title: SEC Act of 2025
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.
crs_summary: Stop Environmental Calculations Act of 2025 or the SEC Act of 2025 This bill prohibits the Securities and Exchange Commission from requiring issuers of securities to make climate-related disclosures that are not material to investors.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.
